user.title: Connect your everHome EcoTracker
user.description:
Enter the IP address of your EcoTracker on your local network.

Make sure the "Local HTTP server" option is enabled in the everHome app (Settings → EcoTracker). You can find the device IP in the everHome app or in your router's device list.

options.title: Update interval
options.description: Choose how often Home Assistant reads new values from the EcoTracker. You can change this later under the integration's options.

data_description.scan_interval: Lower values give more real-time readings but poll the device more often.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the EcoTracker. Check the IP address and that the "Local HTTP server" option is enabled in the everHome app.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant reads new values from the device.
